name: PHASE-53 D4 S368 — KEEP-BEST upgrade (the R-1 load-bearing regression guard): below-floor claim (base 0.4472, LOW) + better discovered source (0.7071) → the SINGLE kb.cite uses the winning set → the persisted CitationRecord has confidence MEDIUM, and citations.jsonl holds EXACTLY ONE record for the claim (no duplicate append, no strip — pre-cite keep-best per R-1). The record itself carries NO below_floor field (R-2: summary-level only).
